mcqs.question: In Producer-Consumer, the 'empty' semaphore is initialized to:
mcqs.explanation: Empty counts available slots, initially all N slots are empty. Full is initialized to 0, mutex to 1.

mcqs.question: In Dining Philosophers, deadlock occurs when:

options.text: All philosophers pick up left chopstick simultaneously
One philosopher eats for too long
Two philosophers sit next to each other

mcqs.explanation: If all pick left chopstick, each waits for right chopstick held by neighbor → circular wait → deadlock.

mcqs.question: In first Readers-Writers solution, which entity may starve?
mcqs.explanation: Readers preference: continuous readers keep write_lock held. Writers wait indefinitely if readers keep arriving.

mcqs.question: In Producer-Consumer, if producer does wait(mutex) before wait(empty):
mcqs.explanation: If buffer is full: producer holds mutex, waits on empty. Consumer waits on mutex to signal empty. Deadlock!
